mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.nickname, u.email, u.social_type, u.status, u.region_id, r.region_name, u.email_verified, u.created_at, u.updated_at FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON u.region_id = r.region_id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user u WHERE 1=1

SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.nickname, u.email, u.social_type, u.status, u.region_id, r.region_name, u.profile_image, u.profile_image_type, u.email_verified, u.created_at, u.updated_at, DATE_FORMAT(u.updated_at, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS img_ver FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON u.region_id = r.region_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT uc.user_coupon_id, uc.user_id, uc.coupon_id, uc.coupon_code, c.coupon_name, s.store_name, c.benefit, uc.status, uc.used_at, uc.created_at FROM tb_user_coupon uc JOIN tb_coupon c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id JOIN tb_store s ON c.store_id = s.store_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY uc.created_at DESC
